sentences.arabic: النَّوْمُ الْجَيِّدُ ضَرُورِيٌّ لِلصِّحَّةِ النَّفْسِيَّةِ وَالْبَدَنِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Dobar san je neophodan za mentalno i fizičko zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: Good sleep is essential for mental and physical health.

sentences.arabic: نَامَ الطِّفْلُ ثَمَانِيَ سَاعَاتٍ وَاسْتَيْقَظَ مُبَكِّرًا.
sentences.translation: Dijete je spavalo osam sati i probudilo se rano.
sentences.translationEn: The child slept for eight hours and woke up early.

sentences.arabic: الرَّاحَةُ تُسَاعِدُ الْإِنْسَانَ عَلَى الْعَمَلِ بِنَشَاطٍ.
sentences.translation: Odmor pomaže čovjeku da radi aktivno.
sentences.translationEn: Rest helps a person work actively.
